Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Subspace warp]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 27''' — A Subspace warp is a type of movement generated by an internal Drive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — A Subspace warp can cause Horizon to dismiss her avatar.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — Subspace warp is a method of movement used by Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — A massive Subspace warp is approaching the system.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — A Subspace warp opened up in front of the characters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — A Subspace warp began to appear in front of the ship's nose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Subspace warps allow ships to slip into the physical world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Shyrax can tear apart a Subspace warp with a spell.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
